calendar.matters:
DEMURRER to PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Nov-20-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Michael Khouri, Esq. 949-336-2433 Khouti Law Firm for Petitioner.
Lesley Brast, Esq. 415-703-5548 DEputy Attorney General for Respondent.

ARGUED. Mr. Brast informs the court of the last day for reconsideration and has sent 2 versions of proposed orders. Mr. Khouri contests and argues; GC 1094.5, issue on notice and service, issue on verification. Ms. Brast responds; court to take a novel approach, SOL missed by a mile, time period. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

RESPONDENT BOARD OF REGISTERED NURSING DEMURRER to PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION.

Defendant Board of Registered Nursing's demurrer to Plaintiff Geoffrey Wesley Lynch's petition for writ of mandate.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***

DEMURRER to PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2025 Continued To Nov-20-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Michael Khouri, Esq. 949-680-6332 Khouri Law Firm for Petitioner.
Leslie Brast, Esq. Deputy Attorney General 415-703-5548 for Respondent.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice to contest the TR was received from Petitioner.

ARGUED. Mr. Khouri contests that "no opposition was filed" and that the old demurrer and the new demurrer are the same. The Court comments and states timeline of demurrer filed in May and the demurrer filed in September. The Court expresses its inclination to continue. Ms. Brast does not object and declares the present demurrer may be different. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

RESPONDENT BOARD OF REGISTERED NURSING DEMURRER to PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION.

Respondent Board of Registered Nursing's unopposed demurer to Petition for Writ of Mandate.

Continued to 11/20/25 (Thursday) at 9:00am in DEpt. 302. Opposition due by 11/10/25. Reply due by 11/14/25. Courtesy copies to the department within 24 hours of submission for filing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

DEMURRER to PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Aug-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT BOARD OF REGISTERED NURSING DEMURRER to PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION.

Off calendar. The Brast declaration shows parties only met and conferred before this petition was filed, and did not meet and confer to any operative complaint, as required by CCP 430.41(a). The response to the petition is now due on September 8, 2025.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
